name: smart-json-formatter
description: Fractal JSON formatting: Compacts simple lists, expands complex objects.

smartJsonFormatter.sortKeysAlphabeticall.description: Sort object keys alphabetically when formatting.

smartJsonFormatter.maxWidth.description: Maximum line width before expanding an object or array to multiple lines.

smartJsonFormatter.indent.description: Number of spaces used for each indentation level.

smartJsonFormatter.stripComments.description: Strip // and /* */ comments before parsing. When false, a file with comments will produce an error instead of silently removing them.

scripts.compile: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js
scripts.package: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js --production
scripts.pretest: npm run compile-tests && npm run compile && npm run lint
